backgrounds.name: Sev'rinn Initiate
backgrounds.description: Chosen for elemental attunement training under the Sev'rinn order. Whether you completed training or not, elemental essence still lingers within you.
backgrounds.equipment: Small crystal vial (remnants of a failed elemental ritual), simple robes, scroll with elemental theory notes, 10 gp

feature.name: Elemental Echoes
feature.description: Once per long rest, you can subtly influence the environment with elemental essence—stir a gentle breeze, flare a small spark, or ripple nearby water. This minor effect can influence NPCs or hint at your elemental connection.

backgrounds.name: Ban Mynydd Miner
backgrounds.description: Raised in the deep tunnels of Ban Mynydd, you are accustomed to dark, cramped, and dangerous underground work.
backgrounds.equipment: Small piece of raw ore, miner's tools, sturdy boots, 5 gp

feature.name: Tunnel Instincts
feature.description: You have advantage on Survival checks to navigate underground or labyrinthine environments. You have a knack for locating weak points in stone structures.

backgrounds.name: Skywatcher of Holmea
backgrounds.description: Trained among the high spires and floating sanctuaries of Holmea, you are familiar with astral magic and the movements of celestial bodies.
backgrounds.equipment: Star chart (Holmea-only constellations), small telescope, common clothes, 8 gp

feature.name: Starborn Wisdom
feature.description: Once per long rest, you can ask the GM a yes-or-no question about events or locations connected to the astral plane. The answer may come as a cryptic hint or vision during your next long rest.

backgrounds.name: Ghost Whisperer of Dollow Canyon
backgrounds.description: You learned to interact with the unnatural spirits teeming in the twisted growth of Dollow Canyon. Ghosts know your name.
languages: One of your choice (often tied to ancient rituals or necromancy)
backgrounds.equipment: Simple lantern, ritual dagger, journal of ghost stories, 10 gp

feature.name: Whispered Guidance
feature.description: Once per long rest, you can call upon a minor ghost for assistance. It provides brief, vague information about a place, person, or event you inquire about.

backgrounds.name: Kigan Uldar Champion
backgrounds.description: You trained for years in Kigan Uldar—a brutal competition where skill, endurance, and quick thinking determine victory.
backgrounds.equipment: Token of victory (medal, whistle, or cloth strip), athletic clothes, waterskin, 12 gp

feature.name: Fame of the Field
feature.description: Your recognition from sport fans may grant you shelter, food, or basic supplies. You can also gain access to competitive events and secure audiences with high-status individuals who enjoy the sport.

backgrounds.name: Utfordring Diver
backgrounds.description: Your life was spent training in the depths—an agile and strategic underwater competitor, whether in the official league or unsanctioned matches.
backgrounds.equipment: Diving mask or Utfordring trinket, waterproof pouch (10 gp), game token from a match, lightweight clothing

feature.name: Aquatic Agility
feature.description: You have advantage on Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks made underwater to avoid hazards or escape grapples. Utfordring athletes and fans may recognize you and grant favors or information.

backgrounds.name: Weirding Refugee
backgrounds.description: Displaced by a Weird Zone disaster, you are a survivor carrying mental or physical scars from the experience. The Weirding left its mark on you.
backgrounds.equipment: Shard of strange glass from your home, plain clothes, small journal with scribbled memories, 5 gp

feature.name: Touched by the Weirding
feature.description: Once per long rest, you can make a Wisdom (Insight) check to predict how an unfamiliar creature or person might react. You also have advantage on checks to understand or resist environmental anomalies caused by Weird Zones.

backgrounds.name: Hurstwold Warden
backgrounds.description: You walked the paths of the ancient Hurstwold forest, learning to navigate its treacherous terrain and coexist with its mystical inhabitants.
backgrounds.equipment: Wooden charm from the forest, hunting knife, cloak of enchanted leaves, 10 gp

feature.name: Friend of the Forest
feature.description: You can move through difficult terrain in Hurstwold without penalty. Creatures native to the forest are less likely to view you as a threat, and may offer aid or information.

backgrounds.name: Surreymouth Trader
backgrounds.description: You grew up navigating Surreymouth's bustling markets and docks, mastering the art of haggling, bargaining, and moving goods—legally or otherwise.
tool_proficiencies: Vehicles (water) or one type of gaming set
backgrounds.equipment: Ledger of trade contacts, fine clothes, satchel with exotic goods samples, 15 gp

feature.name: Marketplace Connections
feature.description: Once per long rest, you can secure a discount or locate a rare item (subject to GM approval). You can also use your contacts to gather rumors and information from the merchant networks of Ryndor.
